passage.title: A Day with Should Have
passage.text: I should have come earlier. You should have apologized to him. He should have worked harder. I should have told this earlier. We should have been more careful. You should have listened to him. She should have told the truth. I should have read this book. We should have arrived on time. You should not have made this mistake.
passage.hindiTranslation: मुझे पहले आना चाहिए था। तुम्हें उससे माफी मांगनी चाहिए थी। उसे ज्यादा मेहनत करनी चाहिए थी। मुझे यह पहले बताना चाहिए था। हमें ज्यादा सावधान रहना चाहिए था। तुम्हें उसकी बात सुननी चाहिए थी। उसे सच बोलना चाहिए था। मुझे यह किताब पढ़नी चाहिए थी। हमें समय पर पहुँचना चाहिए था। तुम्हें यह गलती नहीं करनी चाहिए थी।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I should have come..."?
options: I should have read this book.
She should not have left this job.
You should have apologized to him.
I should have come earlier.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I should have come earlier."

I should have practiced more.
He should have worked harder.
You should have apologized to him.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: You should have apologized to him.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "You should have apologized to him."

options: She should not have left this job.
